name: Sandbox Pack
description: 受控命令执行与云桌面沙箱能力包：保留管理员授权边界，并让高风险执行面可被 Pack Runtime 启停。

routeSpecs.description: Execute an admin-approved command inside the local sandbox policy.
Probe cloud sandbox and Tori cloud desktop readiness.
Create or reuse an authenticated cloud desktop sandbox.
Read the current cloud desktop sandbox status.
Destroy the current cloud desktop sandbox.
Destroy the current cloud desktop sandbox.

metadata.auth: Pack Runtime controls enablement; exec/probe/create compose host RequireAuth+RequireAdmin inside the pack.
metadata.computer_use_relation: Computer Use reads cloud desktop status through the sandbox pack, but local desktop control remains outside this slice.
metadata.note: Natively owns /v1/sandbox/* so high-risk command/cloud-desktop surfaces can be disabled as a capability pack.
metadata.usageSurface: 工具页、受控命令执行与云桌面沙箱
metadata.example1: 让高风险命令执行走受控沙箱边界。
metadata.example2: 查看云桌面或执行器是否可用。
metadata.example3: 通过 Pack 启停控制沙箱能力是否暴露给任务。
